response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong software engineering experience and leadership in multiple domains, including AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq and distributed systems at Dunnhumby. However, her resume lacks direct evidence of building production-grade multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure (credit risk, working-capital management), or scaling engineering teams to 30+ people. Her agentic work is recent and not deeply documented, and her fintech exposure is limited. She meets some leadership and distributed-systems criteria but falls short on critical domain-specific requirements.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq, MCP, Model Context Protocol)
Proven technical leadership in scaling engineering teams and implementing DevOps practices
concerns: No clear evidence of building production multi-agent AI systems in commercial fintech contexts
Limited fintech-specific experience (credit risk, working-capital, embedded finance)
Lacks documented experience scaling teams to 30+ engineers or governing hybrid engineering models
